register.note: Full content-width before/after diptych, framed with kicker captions, legend and 101-vs-23 step counts — poster-worthy and thumbnail-legible, though two panels rather than one singular object.

Goes past Anscombe's error-rectangles: draws both loss surfaces (stretched valley vs round bowl) AND the optimizer's path across each (zig-zag fan vs near-straight fall) — cause and consequence in one frame, exemplar-grade.
The see-view graphic carries its own axis labels, a labeled 'valley floor (OLS)' target, a labeled 'start', an in-canvas legend, and a tinted 'WALK SO FAR' readout — meaning lives in the graphic.
Anti-aliased warm-red contour field, Distill-soft, with the white valley floor pulling the eye to the minimum — clean focal hierarchy matching the watch's restraint.
A single explanatory load-in descent (path draws itself, reduced-motion renders pre-walked) plus scrub/step transport on run/break — explanatory not decorative.
Grammar held like R2D3's class hues: purple=descent/path, teal=action, the red field is loss-magnitude with a legend (encoded, not draining 'error'), prose terms tinted and AA-legible.

hero.note: Before/after hero: same-data diptych, in-figure legend and step counts, both loss surfaces with descents drawn in, one load-in animation; panel height trimmed so the capture no longer clips the bottoms.

assessment.note: The transfer item (transfer-knn) is an open free-text prompt — 'write it in your own words' — not another MCQ.

verdict.summary: New hero clears hero-as-protagonist (3) and is exemplar-grade on mechanism-in-the-picture (4); all six hero booleans pass and every register dim is at floor 3 — clears register 3 across the board.
